TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Knbung = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Knbung. 128 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 377 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 339 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal83%, Amis2%, ni rahuq na o5%. Hangan alang alang Fang-fang. Pnseanak alang Ga I-ran-seyn ta-tung-syang syang ni Taw-yueyn-syeyn fu-sin-sang babaw dxgal ka alang In-s, kana alang ga ida bi niqan hangan na saan rmigaw ka ga Ci- ran sheng- mu-cyu ni Ming-c rgrigan bbuyu. Alang fang-fang ksun uri. Nniqan Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang Ing-s-cun. Llbangan Ga Ran-yang-si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan hiya. Llingay ti-ri Dxgal sttuan. Pgkla ppanan rulu Mgriq rulu: Tay-pe > Ji-rong-ru > Ji-rong kaw-cya-daw-ru > swey-yueyn daw-ru > Cung-jeng-ru > Pe-sin-ru > Sin-wu-ru > Cung-je-ru >Ceng-kung-ru > Yan-ti-ru > Tay-jyo-cya > Tong-s-rin-daw > Yi-jye-ru > Hu-cyan-ru >Ta-ang-ru > Ney-cheng- ru > Cu-keng-ru > Pey-pu-hen-kwang-kung-ru > Ci-teyn. Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Teyn-c pneyusan alang. Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari kari Tayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alan In-s-cun hangan na sbiyaw o kika Fang-fang- se, ga Ran-yang-si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan hiya, 60 hngkawas idas mataru murux phyugan ka nRe-swey cun. Man-cing siida, klgan seejiq Si-tow lmiqu ka Fang-fang, ungac seejiq ga mniq hiya, Atayal siida mniq sipaw dgiyaq lnbuan Fang-fang ni duma dgiyaq gqiyan hiya, ga phiyug Pa- ken, Ta-ta-han, Ta-po tru ciway se, yasa mniq dgiyaq gqiyan hunac ka Fan-fan, kika Fang- fang hangan na. Kwang-fu Tay-wan siida, ga sliqan bgihur, yasa kntetu qmuyux paru kjiyax, babaw Se-ce asi lux kpruq, slhbun bi sblaiq na, powda pprngaw snruwa do, pseupu tnhjilan nniqan Fang-fang sayang. Nniqan sayang ga igi sipaw yayung Ran-yang- si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan ka daya yaa bi 500 m, psnakan dha dxgal alang daya, truma, kingal ga daya dgiyaq lnbuan In-s sapah ptasan, knbbaraw na o msdalih 400m, nstbiyax sttu nii ga kiya ka knealang sttuan nniqan kiya. Kingal ga sdalih In-s sapah ptasan ni truma breenux hari, klwaan sapah pyasan ga phiyug hini kana.In-s-cun ga pay-ku-si (Ling-seng-syang(Pa-kus)), kika ddhuq daya heng-kwang-kong-ru, nSyang ni Taw-yueyn-seyn Fu-sin-syang siyaw uri, klwaan ruwan Ci-ran Sen-mu-cy ni Min-c Sen-ring-yow-re-cyu ida bi niqan hangan na ssaan dha rgrigaw. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu sqyanan dxgal. Fang-fang Cyaw-hwey 03-9801733 (26741)Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang In-s cun 3 ling Fang-fang syang 46 haw. Kwan-kwang ssaan rmigaw.Qhjing Fang-fang Qhjing Fang-fang nYi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang In-s-cun, babaw nniqan dxgal nyusang Cung- hen Yi-ran, plalay na o dhiyaqan hunac daya hraan hidaw na Pay-ta-cyaw yaa bi 2.5 m nniqan, sayang o ida niqan sbiyaw qqtaan ka alang dgiyaq qhjing na. Kika Mey-kay ri-c na Cyen-sin-tang-shwang-cyuen, ini qruciq teura bi ka qsiya, qhjing yaa bi se-s 52 tu, ana cikuh ka qsiya, ida ana knuwan niqan qsiya kjiyax. Qhjing ga mrudu ka btunux, saw bi lmiqu nniqan, ini gmbarah dxgal chu-nyu ka sayang, knealang seejiq ga babaw qsiya ayug qbilan btunux ka qsiya, snluan trima hiyi ka nganguc, niqan bi wada sbiyaw qtaan, asi laxi ka trmaan gaya sayang. Min-c-kwo-cya rgrigan bbuyu. Ga Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang, knbbaraw na o yaa bi kska 1150~1700m, ruwa o niqan mbiyaxHow-tung Cung-sin, rabu qnpahan, mkksa bbuyu dnii phyugan rmigaw nniqan, nkiya kndkilan sbiyaw, rahuq duma mttuku rgrigan qtaan ka bbuyu, muda kska mtmay hiya ka klgan qduda, klgan klalay, brihuc, yueyn-yang mgsama tunux bibi dnii dSamac, prajing rbagan siida, thngay dgiyaq ka tuhuy hnang kjiyac, paru nkiya uyas nii o qrasun bi yahun rmrigaw sjiqan. Qtaan bnatas patas In-s se-cyu fa-cang sye-hwey.Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang kung-syow.
S.PHON: = knbuŇč = gaga mniq jilan tatuŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč knbuŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč. pns…ôanak alaŇč ga i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč sjaŇč ni taw-ju…ôn-sj…ôn *u-sin-saŇč babaw dxgal ka alaŇč in-s, kana alaŇč ga ida bi niqan ńßaŇčan na saan …ĺmigaw ka ga ¶i- …ĺan sńß…ôŇč- mu- ¶ju ni miŇč- ¶ …ĺg…ĺigan bbuju. alaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč ksun u…ĺi. nniqan ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč iŇč-s- ¶un. llbaŇčan ga …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ńßija. lliŇčaj ti-…ĺi dxgal sttuan. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: taj-p…ô > …üi-…ĺoŇč-…ĺu > …üi-…ĺoŇč kaw- ¶ja-daw-…ĺu > sw…ô-ju…ôn daw-…ĺu > ¶uŇč-…ü…ôŇč-…ĺu > p…ô-sin-…ĺu > sin-wu-…ĺu > ¶uŇč-…ü…ô-…ĺu > ¶…ôŇč-kuŇč-…ĺu > jan-ti-…ĺu > taj-…üjo- ¶ja > toŇč-s-…ĺin-daw > ji-…üj…ô-…ĺu > ńßu- ¶jan-…ĺu >ta-aŇč-…ĺu > n…ô- ¶ńß…ôŇč- …ĺu > ¶u-k…ôŇč-…ĺu > p…ô-pu-ńß…ôn-kwaŇč-kuŇč-…ĺu > ¶i-t…ôn. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alan in-s- ¶un ńßaŇčan na sbijaw o kika *aŇč-*aŇč- s…ô, ga …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ńßija, ** ńßŇčkawas idas mata…ĺu mu…ĺux pńßjugan ka n…ĺ…ô-sw…ô ¶un. man- ¶iŇč siida, klgan s…ô…ô…üiq si-tow lmiqu ka *aŇč-*aŇč, uŇča ¶ s…ô…ô…üiq ga mniq ńßija, atajal siida mniq sipaw dgijaq lnbuan *aŇč-*aŇč ni duma dgijaq gqijan ńßija, ga pńßijug pa- k…ôn, ta-ta-ńßan, ta-po t…ĺu ¶iwaj s…ô, jasa mniq dgijaq gqijan ńßuna ¶ ka *an-*an, kika *aŇč- *aŇč ńßaŇčan na. kwaŇč-*u taj-wan siida, ga sliqan bgińßu…ĺ, jasa knt…ôtu qmujux pa…ĺu k…üijax, babaw s…ô- ¶…ô asi lux kp…ĺuq, slńßbun bi sblaiq na, powda pp…ĺŇčaw sn…ĺuwa do, ps…ôupu tnńß…üilan nniqan *aŇč-*aŇč sajaŇč. nniqan sajaŇč ga igi sipaw jajuŇč …ĺan-jaŇč- si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ka daja jaa bi *** m, psnakan dńßa dxgal alaŇč daja, t…ĺuma, kiŇčal ga daja dgijaq lnbuan in-s sapańß ptasan, knbba…ĺaw na o msdalińß ***m, nstbijax sttu nii ga kija ka kn…ôalaŇč sttuan nniqan kija. kiŇčal ga sdalińß in-s sapańß ptasan ni t…ĺuma b…ĺ…ô…ônux ńßa…ĺi, klwaan sapańß pjasan ga pńßijug ńßini kana.in-s- ¶un ga paj-ku-si (liŇč-s…ôŇč-sjaŇč(pa-kus)), kika ddńßuq daja ńß…ôŇč-kwaŇč-koŇč-…ĺu, nsjaŇč ni taw-ju…ôn-s…ôn *u-sin-sjaŇč sijaw u…ĺi, klwaan …ĺuwan ¶i-…ĺan s…ôn-mu- ¶j ni min- ¶ s…ôn-…ĺiŇč-jow-…ĺ…ô- ¶ju ida bi niqan ńßaŇčan na ssaan dńßa …ĺg…ĺigaw. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu sqjanan dxgal. *aŇč-*aŇč ¶jaw-ńßw…ô **-******* (*****)ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč in-s ¶un * liŇč *aŇč-*aŇč sjaŇč ** ńßaw. kwan-kwaŇč ssaan …ĺmigaw.qńß…üiŇč *aŇč-*aŇč qńß…üiŇč *aŇč-*aŇč nji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč in-s- ¶un, babaw nniqan dxgal njusaŇč ¶uŇč- ńß…ôn ji-…ĺan, plalaj na o dńßijaqan ńßuna ¶ daja ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw na paj-ta- ¶jaw jaa bi *.* m nniqan, sajaŇč o ida niqan sbijaw qqtaan ka alaŇč dgijaq qńß…üiŇč na. kika m…ô-kaj …ĺi- ¶ na ¶j…ôn-sin-taŇč-sńßwaŇč- ¶ju…ôn, ini q…ĺu ¶iq t…ôu…ĺa bi ka qsija, qńß…üiŇč jaa bi s…ô-s ** tu, ana ¶ikuńß ka qsija, ida ana knuwan niqan qsija k…üijax. qńß…üiŇč ga m…ĺudu ka btunux, saw bi lmiqu nniqan, ini gmba…ĺańß dxgal ¶ńßu-nju ka sajaŇč, kn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ga babaw qsija ajug qbilan btunux ka qsija, snluan t…ĺima ńßiji ka ŇčaŇču ¶, niqan bi wada sbijaw qtaan, asi laxi ka t…ĺmaan gaja sajaŇč. min- ¶-kwo- ¶ja …ĺg…ĺigan bbuju. ga ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč, knbba…ĺaw na o jaa bi kska ****~****m, …ĺuwa o niqan mbijaxńßow-tuŇč ¶uŇč-sin, …ĺabu qnpańßan, mkksa bbuju dnii pńßjugan …ĺmigaw nniqan, nkija kndkilan sbijaw, …ĺańßuq duma mttuku …ĺg…ĺigan qtaan ka bbuju, muda kska mtmaj ńßija ka klgan qduda, klgan klalaj, b…ĺińßu ¶, ju…ôn-jaŇč mgsama tunux bibi dnii dsama ¶, p…ĺa…üiŇč …ĺbagan siida, tńßŇčaj dgijaq ka tuńßuj ńßnaŇč k…üija ¶, pa…ĺu nkija ujas nii o q…ĺasun bi jańßun …ĺm…ĺigaw s…üiqan. qtaan bnatas patas in-s s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô.ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč-sjow.
S.FORM: = Knbung = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Knbung. 128 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 377 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 339 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal83%, Amis2%, ni rahuq na o5%. Hangan alang alang Fang-fang. Pnseanak alang Ga I-ran-seyn ta-tung-syang syang ni Taw-yueyn-syeyn fu-sin-sang babaw dxgal ka alang In-s, kana alang ga ida bi niqan hangan na saan rmigaw ka ga Ci- ran sheng- mu-cyu ni Ming-c rgrigan bbuyu. Alang fang-fang ksun uri. Nniqan Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang Ing-s-cun. Llbangan Ga Ran-yang-si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan hiya. Llingay ti-ri Dxgal sttuan. Pgkla ppanan rulu Mgriq rulu: Tay-pe > Ji-rong-ru > Ji-rong kaw-cya-daw-ru > swey-yueyn daw-ru > Cung-jeng-ru > Pe-sin-ru > Sin-wu-ru > Cung-je-ru >Ceng-kung-ru > Yan-ti-ru > Tay-jyo-cya > Tong-s-rin-daw > Yi-jye-ru > Hu-cyan-ru >Ta-ang-ru > Ney-cheng- ru > Cu-keng-ru > Pey-pu-hen-kwang-kung-ru > Ci-teyn. Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Teyn-c pneyusan alang. Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari kari Tayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alan In-s-cun hangan na sbiyaw o kika Fang-fang- se, ga Ran-yang-si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan hiya, 60 hngkawas idas mataru murux phyugan ka nRe-swey cun. Man-cing siida, klgan seejiq Si-tow lmiqu ka Fang-fang, ungac seejiq ga mniq hiya, Atayal siida mniq sipaw dgiyaq lnbuan Fang-fang ni duma dgiyaq gqiyan hiya, ga phiyug Pa- ken, Ta-ta-han, Ta-po tru ciway se, yasa mniq dgiyaq gqiyan hunac ka Fan-fan, kika Fang- fang hangan na. Kwang-fu Tay-wan siida, ga sliqan bgihur, yasa kntetu qmuyux paru kjiyax, babaw Se-ce asi lux kpruq, slhbun bi sblaiq na, powda pprngaw snruwa do, pseupu tnhjilan nniqan Fang-fang sayang. Nniqan sayang ga igi sipaw yayung Ran-yang- si ni nyusang Fang-fang-si strngan ka daya yaa bi 500 m, psnakan dha dxgal alang daya, truma, kingal ga daya dgiyaq lnbuan In-s sapah ptasan, knbbaraw na o msdalih 400m, nstbiyax sttu nii ga kiya ka knealang sttuan nniqan kiya. Kingal ga sdalih In-s sapah ptasan ni truma breenux hari, klwaan sapah pyasan ga phiyug hini kana.In-s-cun ga pay-ku-si (Ling-seng-syang(Pa-kus)), kika ddhuq daya heng-kwang-kong-ru, nSyang ni Taw-yueyn-seyn Fu-sin-syang siyaw uri, klwaan ruwan Ci-ran Sen-mu-cy ni Min-c Sen-ring-yow-re-cyu ida bi niqan hangan na ssaan dha rgrigaw. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu sqyanan dxgal. Fang-fang Cyaw-hwey 03-9801733 (26741)Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang In-s cun 3 ling Fang-fang syang 46 haw. Kwan-kwang ssaan rmigaw.Qhjing Fang-fang Qhjing Fang-fang nYi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang In-s-cun, babaw nniqan dxgal nyusang Cung- hen Yi-ran, plalay na o dhiyaqan hunac daya hraan hidaw na Pay-ta-cyaw yaa bi 2.5 m nniqan, sayang o ida niqan sbiyaw qqtaan ka alang dgiyaq qhjing na. Kika Mey-kay ri-c na Cyen-sin-tang-shwang-cyuen, ini qruciq teura bi ka qsiya, qhjing yaa bi se-s 52 tu, ana cikuh ka qsiya, ida ana knuwan niqan qsiya kjiyax. Qhjing ga mrudu ka btunux, saw bi lmiqu nniqan, ini gmbarah dxgal chu-nyu ka sayang, knealang seejiq ga babaw qsiya ayug qbilan btunux ka qsiya, snluan trima hiyi ka nganguc, niqan bi wada sbiyaw qtaan, asi laxi ka trmaan gaya sayang. Min-c-kwo-cya rgrigan bbuyu. Ga Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang, knbbaraw na o yaa bi kska 1150~1700m, ruwa o niqan mbiyaxHow-tung Cung-sin, rabu qnpahan, mkksa bbuyu dnii phyugan rmigaw nniqan, nkiya kndkilan sbiyaw, rahuq duma mttuku rgrigan qtaan ka bbuyu, muda kska mtmay hiya ka klgan qduda, klgan klalay, brihuc, yueyn-yang mgsama tunux bibi dnii dSamac, prajing rbagan siida, thngay dgiyaq ka tuhuy hnang kjiyac, paru nkiya uyas nii o qrasun bi yahun rmrigaw sjiqan. Qtaan bnatas patas In-s se-cyu fa-cang sye-hwey.Yi-ran-seyn Ta-tung-syang kung-syow.

u…ĺi. nniqan ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč iŇč-s- ¶un. llbaŇčan ga …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ńßija. lliŇčaj ti-…ĺi dxgal sttuan. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: taj-p…ô > …üi-…ĺoŇč-…ĺu > …üi-…ĺoŇč kaw- ¶ja-daw-…ĺu > sw…ô-ju…ôn daw-…ĺu > ¶uŇč-…ü…ôŇč-…ĺu > p…ô-sin-…ĺu > sin-wu-…ĺu > ¶uŇč-…ü…ô-…ĺu > ¶…ôŇč-kuŇč-…ĺu > jan-ti-…ĺu > taj-…üjo- ¶ja > toŇč-s-…ĺin-daw > ji-…üj…ô-…ĺu > ńßu- ¶jan-…ĺu >ta-aŇč-…ĺu > n…ô- ¶ńß…ôŇč- …ĺu > ¶u-k…ôŇč-…ĺu > p…ô-pu-ńß…ôn-kwaŇč-kuŇč-…ĺu > ¶i-t…ôn. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ t…ôn- ¶ pn…ôusan alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alan in-s- ¶un ńßaŇčan na sbijaw o kika *aŇč-*aŇč- s…ô, ga …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ńßija, ** ńßŇčkawas idas mata…ĺu mu…ĺux pńßjugan ka n…ĺ…ô-sw…ô ¶un. man- ¶iŇč siida, klgan s…ô…ô…üiq si-tow lmiqu ka *aŇč-*aŇč, uŇča ¶ s…ô…ô…üiq ga mniq ńßija, atajal siida mniq sipaw dgijaq lnbuan *aŇč-*aŇč ni duma dgijaq gqijan ńßija, ga pńßijug pa- k…ôn, ta-ta-ńßan, ta-po t…ĺu ¶iwaj s…ô, jasa mniq dgijaq gqijan ńßuna ¶ ka *an-*an, kika *aŇč- *aŇč ńßaŇčan na. kwaŇč-*u taj-wan siida, ga sliqan bgińßu…ĺ, jasa knt…ôtu qmujux pa…ĺu k…üijax, babaw s…ô- ¶…ô asi lux kp…ĺuq, slńßbun bi sblaiq na, powda pp…ĺŇčaw sn…ĺuwa do, ps…ôupu tnńß…üilan nniqan *aŇč-*aŇč sajaŇč. nniqan sajaŇč ga igi sipaw jajuŇč …ĺan-jaŇč- si ni njusaŇč *aŇč-*aŇč-si st…ĺŇčan ka daja jaa bi *** m, psnakan dńßa dxgal alaŇč daja, t…ĺuma, kiŇčal ga daja dgijaq lnbuan in-s sapańß ptasan, knbba…ĺaw na o msdalińß ***m, nstbijax sttu nii ga kija ka kn…ôalaŇč sttuan nniqan kija. kiŇčal ga sdalińß in-s sapańß ptasan ni t…ĺuma b…ĺ…ô…ônux ńßa…ĺi, klwaan sapańß pjasan ga pńßijug ńßini kana.in-s- ¶un ga paj-ku-si (liŇč-s…ôŇč-sjaŇč(pa-kus)), …ĺg…ĺigaw. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu sqjanan dxgal. *aŇč-*aŇč ¶jaw-ńßw…ô **-******* (*****)ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč in-s ¶un * liŇč *aŇč-*aŇč sjaŇč ** ńßaw. kwan-kwaŇč ssaan …ĺmigaw.qńß…üiŇč *aŇč-*aŇč qńß…üiŇč *aŇč-*aŇč nji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč in-s- ¶un, babaw nniqan dxgal njusaŇč ¶uŇč- ńß…ôn ji-…ĺan, plalaj na o dńßijaqan ńßuna ¶ daja ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw na paj-ta- ¶jaw jaa bi *.* m nniqan, sajaŇč o ida niqan sbijaw qqtaan ka alaŇč dgijaq qńß…üiŇč na. kika m…ô-kaj …ĺi- ¶ na ¶j…ôn-sin-taŇč-sńßwaŇč- ¶ju…ôn, ini q…ĺu ¶iq t…ôu…ĺa bi ka qsija, qńß…üiŇč jaa bi s…ô-s ** tu, ana ¶ikuńß ka qsija, ida ana knuwan niqan qsija k…üijax. qńß…üiŇč ga m…ĺudu ka btunux, saw bi lmiqu nniqan, ini gmba…ĺańß dxgal ¶ńßu-nju ka sajaŇč, kn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq ga babaw qsija ajug qbilan btunux ka qsija, snluan t…ĺima ńßiji ka ŇčaŇču ¶, niqan bi wada sbijaw qtaan, asi laxi ka t…ĺmaan gaja sajaŇč. min- ¶-kwo- ¶ja …ĺg…ĺigan bbuju. ga ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč, knbba…ĺaw na o jaa bi kska ****~****m, qduda, klgan klalaj, b…ĺińßu ¶, ju…ôn-jaŇč mgsama tunux bibi dnii dsama ¶, p…ĺa…üiŇč …ĺbagan siida, tńßŇčaj dgijaq ka tuńßuj ńßnaŇč k…üija ¶, pa…ĺu nkija ujas nii o q…ĺasun bi jańßun …ĺm…ĺigaw s…üiqan. qtaan bnatas patas in-s s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô.ji-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč-sjow.
